STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_LOAN_CURSE_CARD.d:
When drawn, gain [gold]50[/gold] gold. 
At the end of your turn, if this card is in your hand, lose [gold]20[/gold] gold.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_DEATH_HARVEST_CAR:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Heal HP equal to unblocked damage
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_FULL_ASSAULT_CARD: Add 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Die Die Die+|Die Die Die}[/gold] to all players' hands.
When you [gold]channel[/gold] an orb, other players will also [gold]channel[/gold] the same orb.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_NO_TURNING_CARD.d:
End one player's turn. 
That player gains 2 [gold]Block[/gold] per card in hand. 
Next turn, gain energy equal to their remaining hand size.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_ALL_HANDS_CRASH_C:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies. 
For each other player, increase damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()}. 
Fill all players' hands with [gold]Debris[/gold].
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_TOMB_RAIDER_GANG_: All players choose 1 card from their Exhaust pile and put it into their hand.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_TEACH_AND_LEARN_C: Whenever you play a [gold]Power card[/gold], each other player gains the same power.
